title: VANTUNG KHUA IH TUNG DING HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zeisu'n an bang hong itna pha,
Lam bang puak zaila sa ni.
Thang van inn tang sua giang nun nuam,
Ko ading ngo bang lang hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Thang van dong (Thang van dong) ih tun ciangin
Deih teng leh lailung damna ngah ding hi
Kum Khua in (Kum Khua in ) la sa ni,
Topa Zeisu ih phat ding hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Thang vantung lam ih zuih laitak,
Zaitha tawlna om ding hi
Hi zong ih pai khit ciangin ah
Zaitha tawl om lo ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Zang ni suah sim ih um ding a,
Limbelh sawisang ih leng ding
Saumang nun nuam kuam bang, luah nang.
Gua bang hin lai ngaih khua ah.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ih mai nopna lailung damna,
Vabang leeng tung nuam ing ci,
Thangvan kankil ih tun ciangin,
Kham vangkhua pi ih mu ding.
